description_long: This is a weathered stone corner wall segment, constructed from large, rectangular limestone blocks stacked in two intersecting planes. The stones display a range of beige, tan, and gray hues, with visible signs of aging such as darkened water stains, moss or small vegetation patches, and surface erosion. The lower portion of the wall is darker and more stained, likely from prolonged contact with moisture or soil, while the upper stones are lighter and more uniform in color. The mortar joints between the stones are irregular, and some blocks show chips or surface roughness, indicating long-term exposure to the elements. The wall meets at a right angle, forming a partial enclosure over a paved stone or concrete ground surface. The overall structure suggests it is part of an old urban barrier, possibly a retaining wall or the corner of a courtyard.
description: A weathered stone corner wall made of large, aged limestone blocks with visible stains, moss, and surface erosion, forming a partial enclosure over a paved ground.
description_view_0: Corner view showing both intersecting stone walls, visible weathering, and the paved ground surface.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on one wall face, highlighting vertical stains, moss patches, and the wall's height.
description_view_2: Oblique view emphasizing the right-angle intersection and the varying coloration of the stone blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second wall face, lighter stone coloration, and some vegetation growth.
attribute_location: historic urban courtyard or retaining wall in an old city center
attribute_placement: incorporated into a corner as part of a larger stone barrier or wall, set on a paved ground
attribute_pattern: Rectangular block pattern with irregular mortar joints, vertical water stains, and patches of moss or lichen; no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Heavily weathered with dark stains, surface erosion, chipped edges, and some moss or vegetation growth indicating long-term exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Partially integrated with the paved ground and adjacent vegetation, blending naturally with the urban environment while showing signs of age and environmental interaction.
